title: Beef and Pilau Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry with beef and pilau, served with crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Beef
ingredients.notes: Slice the beef into thin strips

ingredients.name: Crunchy vegetables
ingredients.notes: Use your favorite crunchy vegetables, such as carrots or bell peppers

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil, such as vegetable oil

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pilau and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the crunchy vegetables and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
